name: autoexp
description: Run agent-led experiments and open browser feedback reviews from existing repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Run experiments and review evidence with your agent.
interface.longDescription: Start agent-led experiments in an existing repository, preserve immutable evidence, optimize metric-driven Autoresearch attempts, and return browser feedback directly to the agent.
defaultPrompt: Use $autoexp:autoexp to start a focused experiment in this repository.
Use $autoexp:autoexp-review to open the browser review and wait for feedback.
